channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Elizabeth Nzisa Recognised for Courage in Raising Siblings Alone
item.description: Elizabeth Nzisa, a 20-year-old from Kayole, has been nominated for the Hero of Africa Awards 2026 for her extraordinary courage and resilience. After losing her mother during childbirth and being aban...

item.title: Kim Kardashian's Friend Jokes About Skipping Wedding with Lewis Hamilton
item.description: Kim Kardashian's long-time friend Jonathan Cheban has caused some chatter after joking that he might skip a wedding if she ties the knot with Formula One champion Lewis Hamilton. Cheban, who is also k...

item.title: The King Congratulates Sir David Attenborough on Reaching 100 Years
item.description: Sir David Attenborough, the renowned broadcaster and natural historian, celebrated his 100th birthday, marking a remarkable milestone in a life dedicated to documenting the natural world. In recogniti...

item.title: House Democrats Outline Strategy for 2028 Redistricting After Virginia Court Ruling
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries responded to a setback in Virginia's congressional redistricting efforts with determination, emphasizing the Democratic Party's strategy ahead of the 2028 electio...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine Agree on Three-Day Ceasefire and 1,000-for-1,000 Prisoner Exchange
item.description: Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a temporary ceasefire from May 9 to May 11, coinciding with the commemoration of the end of the Second World War in Russia. This arrangement comes through mediation e...

item.title: South Africa to Address Xenophobia Concerns at African Union Summit
item.description: Ghana has formally requested that the African Union discuss recent xenophobic attacks in South Africa, prompting Pretoria to prepare its response. The request, sent by Ghanaian Foreign Minister Samuel...

item.title: ACT DPP referred for potential police investigation after accidentally sharing sensitive Gordon Ramsay court document with ABC
item.description: An ACT Magistrates Court magistrate has expressed grave concern over the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions (DPP) after it inadvertently provided the ABC with a redacted statement of facts ...

item.title: Billie Eilish Reflects on Her Career and the Changing Music Landscape
item.description: In a WIRED interview ahead of her new concert film 'Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D),' Billie Eilish reflects on her rise to fame and the evolving music industry. Nearly a decade ago, she g...

item.title: Toronto police investigate shooting incident with replica gun outside synagogue
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a potentially hate-motivated incident that occurred Thursday night outside the Chasidei Bobov synagogue near Bathurst Street and Highway 401. According to authorities,...

item.title: Aliko Dangote and Abdul Samad Rabiu Confirmed Among Africa’s Wealthiest
item.description: Nigerian business moguls Aliko Dangote and Abdul Samad Rabiu, both hailing from Kano State, don maintain dem positions among di richest people for Africa according to di latest Bloomberg Billionaires ...

item.title: Victoria’s Secret website resumes operations following multi-day cyberattack
item.description: Victoria’s Secret’s official website has returned online after being offline for several days due to a cyber incident. The disruption affected customers who were unable to access the site, browse prod...

item.title: British passengers on hantavirus-affected cruise ship to be tested before return
item.description: British passengers and crew aboard the MV Hondius, which has been affected by a hantavirus outbreak, will undergo testing prior to returning to the UK. The ship is expected to dock in Tenerife in the ...

item.title: Key News Highlights for May 8, 2026: Hantavirus, ASEAN Summit, and Exoplanet Discoveries
item.description: On May 8, 2026, several important developments made headlines in the Philippines and around the world. Global authorities are actively tracking passengers from a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus o...

item.title: ConCourt Rules National Assembly Phala Phala Vote Unconstitutional, Revives Impeachment Process
item.description: The Constitutional Court has overturned the National Assembly's December 13, 2022 vote, which had rejected referring the independent Phala Phala panel report to an impeachment committee. Chief Justice...

item.title: Constitutional Court Orders Parliament to Resume Phala Phala Impeachment Process
item.description: The Constitutional Court has overturned the National Assembly's vote from 13 December 2022 that blocked the referral of the independent Phala Phala panel's report to an impeachment committee. The cour...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Election Outcomes and Public Interest in Vijay and TVK
item.description: The recent Tamil Nadu elections have attracted widespread public attention, both for the political outcomes and the cultural trends associated with them. While the final vote counts and party victorie...

item.title: Carly Clarke finds balance and renewal during visits to her family home in Nova Scotia
item.description: Carly Clarke, assistant coach of the Toronto Tempo and a long-time Toronto resident, finds her greatest sense of joy and relaxation far from the city’s fast pace—at her family’s home in Pugwash, Nova ...

item.title: Former Police Officer Injured, Five Suspects Arrested After Attempted Robbery
item.description: A former police officer was wounded while five other individuals were apprehended following a foiled robbery attempt. Authorities reported that the incident took place when the suspects tried to execu...

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales Host Royal Garden Party Recognising Public Service
item.description: On Friday, the Prince and Princess of Wales hosted a royal garden party at Buckingham Palace on behalf of King Charles III. The event welcomed around 8,000 guests from various charitable patronages, m...

item.title: Katie Price shares complications from cosmetic surgeries and expresses regret over Brazilian Butt Lift
item.description: Katie Price, 47, has opened up about the long-term consequences of her cosmetic procedures, particularly a Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL) she underwent in 2019, which nearly cost her life. During a recent ...
